commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the status-menu Quit action to cancel active menu tracking, defer shutdown one main-loop turn, run existing shutdown cleanup, then terminate, with a regression test for deferred termination.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Not independently here; current main source confirms the direct status-menu Quit path, but the Dock wedge itself requires the affected macOS setup described in the linked issue and PR comments.
